name: Facetbox
description: Squares split into four triangular facets, the panes re-lighting on each seed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 50% 50%); clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 50% 50%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(0 100%, 100% 100%, 50% 50%); clip-path: polygon(0 100%, 100% 100%, 50% 50%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
